review.summary: Conference proceedings paper (BSRSL, sdOB10 meeting). Presents preliminary results from spectroscopic, spectrophotometric, and kinematic analysis of the fastest hot subdwarfs from the MUCHFUSS/Hyper-MUCHFUSS projects. No data tables in the paper — only figures (Kiel diagram, Toomre diagram, spectra, SED). No machine-readable data, external data repositories, or data-availability URLs. The paper is a review/proceedings contribution, not a data-release paper. SDSS, Gaia, and Pan-STARRS are generic data source acknowledgements, not specific structured data assets.
